title: STANLEY FATMAX Straight Cut Compound Action Aviation Snips, Suitable for Aluminium, Sheet UPVC, Wire Mesh, Leather, Copper, Plastic and Mild Steel, 2-14-563
features: Aviation snips are great for cutting aluminium sheets, UPVC, wire mesh, leather, copper and plastic
Cuts up to 18 gauge (1.2mm) cold-rolled steel or 23 gauge (0.7mm) stainless-steel
Serrated cutting blades provides a sturdy bite and helps prevent material from slipping during use
Bi-material handle provides improved comfort during use
Made from forged alloy steel for added strength and durability for a longer life
description: From the manufacturer Snips Check out our full line of snips for general and specialty applications. Our snips are precision cutting tools, built to deliver clean cuts every time. Aviation Snips, Straight Cut The STANLEY FATMAX Straight Cut Compound Action Aviation Snips with compound cutting action and serrated cutting blades cut up to 18-gauge cold rolled or 23-gauge stainless steel. Double pivot action allows higher cutting power. Forged molybdenum steel cutting blades for strength and durability. Serrated cutting edges prevent slippage when cutting. Automatic latch release allows one handed operation. Molybdenum serrated blades Automatic latch release Versatile cutting: aluminium, wire mesh, leather, copper, plastic and steel Watch the aviation snips in action!
